name: Global Gas Corp
business: Global Gas Corporation is a nascent pure-play hydrogen and carbon recovery project developer and industrial gas supplier that has commenced initial operations and is building a growing project development pipeline. The company plans to focus primarily on selling systems and equipment, including electrolyzers, steam methane reforming plants, and carbon recovery plants, and may also provide engineering, procurement, construction supervision, and other services. It intends to generate revenue from the sale of equipment and systems and, in the long-term, from the sale of industrial gases from its owned plants.
sellsTo: Traditional industrial chemical users of hydrogen
Food & beverage grade users (brewers, beverage bottlers)

exposures.sentence: In selecting feedstock to generate industrial gases, we will primarily target renewable waste and will need to seek arrangements with owners of renewable waste feedstock, such as wastewater treatment plants, landfills, food waste processing facilities, and agricultural farms, to access their renewable waste feedstock.

On the hydrogen side, we intend to serve traditional industrial gas customers, and are particularly focused on plans to serve the rapidly growing hydrogen-as-energy-carrier market, comprising heavy duty hauling transportation operators such as transit bus agencies, long haul truck fleet operators, truck leasing operators and refuse collection truck operators, many of whom are considering deploying hydrogen fuel cell powertrain vehicles to decarbonize their fleets which currently runs almost exclusively on diesel.
In addition to generating industrial gases from renewable waste feedstock, we plan to generate gases from non-renewable sources including pipeline natural gas.
Global Gas intends for its business model to generate revenue from the sale of equipment and systems and, in the long-term, from the sale of industrial gases from its owned plants.

Additionally, the Company may also provide engineering, procurement, construction supervision (EPC), design, testing, installation, commissioning, plant startup, plant maintenance and operation, site selection, project economic analysis, and project management services to customers and support customers with supervisory services related to installation, commissioning, startup and operation of production facilities or other services as may be required by a customer s project.

catalysts.event: Plan to focus primarily on selling systems and equipment
catalysts.sentence: In 2026, Global Gas plans to focus primarily on selling systems and equipment.

catalysts.event: Anticipates beginning to execute long-term business model and generating revenue from owned plants
catalysts.sentence: Global Gas anticipates beginning to execute its long-term business model and generating revenue from such long-term business model in 2026.
